## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.12.9

### Cameras
- Keeps station-backed camera entities as the primary Home Assistant camera when X-Sense also reports the same physical camera as a device record.
- Prevents duplicate or device-backed camera entities from taking over the camera path that matched the earlier working native Home Assistant WebRTC release.
- Keeps true standalone device cameras available when no matching station-backed camera exists.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for station/device camera records that share the same camera serial.
- Confirms the camera, entity, and platform regression tests pass with this change.
